description: Rewire ScopeCode/source expansion/import-require macro waits so they depend on the compile-time macro backend fact only, not on a macro's participation in the runtime root graph. The core signal is that expanding a defmacro cannot republish the same macro's own FunctionSource/FunctionDefined in a self-sustaining loop. Signal: the item-macro/source-publication traces settle; macro executable/backend revisions do not churn stable macro source facts; local and remote macro expansion tests pass with fixed-point telemetry.
title: Compiler2 macro expansion: depend only on compile-time macro readiness and recover a fixed point
